hero.headline: UPES Online MBA in Finance Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) Online MBA with a Finance Management specialisation. NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, UGC-DEB approved. Financial Institutions and Markets, Financial Econometrics, Corporate Valuation, Behavioural Finance, International Finance and Risk Management, Investment Analysis, Fintech, and Innovation and Entrepreneurship in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: UPES Online MBA Finance Management: NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, fees Rs 1,75,000 (Year 1: Rs 95,000 / Year 2: Rs 80,000), zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month. Finance depth with Financial Econometrics, Corporate Valuation, Behavioural Finance, International Finance and Risk Management, Investment Analysis, Portfolio Management, and Fintech.

about.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Finance Management is offered by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies, Dehradun. UPES holds NAAC A accreditation, NIRF #45 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #36 in Management (2025). The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The Finance Management specialisation delivers Sem 3-4 subjects with a strong quantitative orientation. Sem 3 covers Financial Institutions and Markets, Financial Econometrics, Corporate Valuation, Behavioural Finance, and International Finance and Risk Management. Sem 4 covers Strategic Management, Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management, Financial Technology (Fintech), Innovation and Entrepreneurship, and Dissertation.

Financial Econometrics as a dedicated MBA subject is uncommon among Indian online MBA programmes at this fee range - it provides statistical modelling for financial data analysis directly applicable to quantitative roles in investment banking analytics, risk management, and fintech. Behavioural Finance as a standalone Sem 3 subject combined with Fintech in Sem 4 gives this specialisation a modern forward-looking orientation relative to traditional finance MBA programmes.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Institutions and Markets
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse commercial banking operations, capital market structures, SEBI regulations, and RBI policy for financial services roles.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Econometrics
sem3Subjects.description: Apply regression, time-series modelling, and statistical inference to financial data analysis for investment research and risk management.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Valuation
sem3Subjects.description: Apply DCF, relative valuation, and comparable company analysis to equity valuation, M&A due diligence, and corporate finance decisions.

sem3Subjects.name: Behavioural Finance
sem3Subjects.description: Apply behavioural economics and investor psychology frameworks to portfolio management, consumer finance, and market anomaly analysis.

sem3Subjects.name: International Finance and Risk Management
sem3Subjects.description: Manage FOREX exposure, cross-border capital structures, and country risk assessment for multinational corporate treasury roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem4Subjects.description: Develop finance-led business strategy, evaluate M&A rationale, and design capital allocation frameworks for corporate leadership.

sem4Subjects.name: Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management
sem4Subjects.description: Apply CAPM, Markowitz portfolio theory, equity analysis, and portfolio performance measurement for investment management roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Financial Technology (Fintech)
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate digital lending, blockchain payments, robo-advisory platforms, and embedded finance for fintech and digital banking careers.

sem4Subjects.name: Innovation and Entrepreneurship
sem4Subjects.description: Apply innovation frameworks to fintech product development and finance-led business model design for entrepreneurial finance roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Dissertation
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied finance research project on corporate valuation, portfolio strategy, fintech innovation, or risk management systems.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all UPES MBA specialisations. Core includes Managerial Economics, Accounting for Managers, Marketing Management, Quantitative Techniques, Operations Management, OB and HRM, Project Management, Financial Management, Research Methodology, and Business Analytics for Managers.

whoHires.body:
Finance Management MBA graduates from UPES Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Banking and financial services, Investment management, Fintech, Corporate treasury, Consulting and advisory, Energy sector finance

**Entry-level roles:** Financial Analyst, Investment Analyst, Risk Analyst, Corporate Finance Analyst, Fintech Business Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Finance Manager, Portfolio Manager, Risk Manager, Treasury Manager, Fintech Product Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CFO, Head of Finance, VP Treasury, Investment Director, Chief Risk Officer

**Top hiring organisations (UPES alumni placements):** TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro, Deloitte, KPMG, and BFSI sector firms. UPES's strong energy sector heritage means Energy Finance professionals find direct career pathways at oil and gas, power, and infrastructure companies that recruit UPES graduates specifically.

skills.body:
The UPES Finance Management specialisation builds quantitative finance skills that investment, banking, and corporate finance employers test at analyst and manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Financial Econometrics: regression and time-series modelling for financial data, applicable to investment research, risk quantification, and quantitative finance roles - an uncommon standalone subject in online MBA programmes at this fee range
- Corporate Valuation: DCF and comparable company analysis for equity valuation, M&A advisory, and corporate finance strategy
- International Finance and Risk Management: FOREX risk management, country risk assessment, and cross-border capital structure for treasury and international finance roles
- Investment Analysis and Portfolio Management: CAPM, Markowitz portfolio theory, equity analysis, and portfolio performance measurement for investment management

**Applied skills:**
- Behavioural Finance: investor psychology and market anomaly analysis for wealth management, retail banking, and consumer finance roles
- Financial Technology: digital lending, blockchain, and robo-advisory evaluation for fintech product and digital banking careers

**Soft skills:** Presenting valuation models to investment committees, communicating financial risk to boards, building DCF models for capital allocation decisions, and negotiating credit facilities with banking partners.

comparisons.body:
Comparing UPES Online MBA Finance Management against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Finance:** Amity Finance at Rs 2,25,000 covers corporate finance, investment management, and banking with strong all-India brand recognition. UPES Finance Management at Rs 1,75,000 adds Financial Econometrics and Behavioural Finance as dedicated Sem 3 subjects - a more quantitatively rigorous curriculum than Amity's standard finance track. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking is stronger than Amity's management category performance.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Financial Management:** NMIMS carries strong Mumbai BFSI brand recognition at Rs 1,60,000-1,95,000. For Mumbai investment banking and BFSI careers, NMIMS is the stronger brand choice. For North India corporate treasury, energy sector finance, and fintech roles where UPES alumni network is strong, UPES Finance Management at Rs 1,75,000 is competitive.

**vs LPU Online MBA Finance:** LPU is NIRF #31 University at Rs 1,61,600 with grant. UPES Finance Management includes Financial Econometrics and Behavioural Finance as unique subjects not in LPU's finance curriculum. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking is stronger than LPU's management category rank. For energy sector finance careers, UPES has a clear industry advantage.

fees.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Finance Management has a total program fee of Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years (4 semesters).

**Year-wise fee schedule:**
- Year 1 (Semesters 1 and 2): Rs 95,000
- Year 2 (Semesters 3 and 4): Rs 80,000

**Zero-cost EMI (no-cost EMI available):**
- Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months
- Tenure options: 3 to 36 months
- Zero interest (0% cost EMI) through UPES NBFC lending tie-ups
- Contact our counsellor for current tenure options and approval terms

**Scholarships available (confirmed from UPES scholarships portal):**
- **Academic/Work Experience scholarship**: 10% for 3+ years experience with 55%+ graduation marks; 15% for 5+ years experience; 20% for 10+ years experience
- **Alumni scholarship**: 20% for UPES degree programme graduates
- **Vijay (Sports) scholarship**: 35% to 100% based on national/international achievement level
- Scholarships cannot be combined with corporate MOU discounts
- Scholarship benefit applied semester-wise; eligibility confirmed at admission

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with UPES each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) and carries the UPES name with the MBA designation. The Finance Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India. UPES is WES recognised, making the degree suitable for international credential evaluation.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from UPES Online MBA Finance Management alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Amit Gupta
items.liked: Financial Econometrics was the standout subject - directly applicable to my investment research analyst role. Corporate Valuation gave me DCF modelling skills I use daily. NIRF #36 in Management was a credibility differentiator.
items.disliked: Placement support for finance roles was stronger in Uttarakhand and North India than in Mumbai's BFSI ecosystem.
items.body: I had 3 years in corporate banking and the UPES Finance MBA gave me the quantitative credentials for an investment analyst transition. The Fintech subject was relevant for my current fintech employer.

items.name: Neha Agarwal
items.liked: Behavioural Finance and Investment Analysis were well-structured. International Finance and Risk Management gave good FOREX management grounding.
items.disliked: For Mumbai investment banking, NMIMS carries stronger brand recognition. Self-sourcing was needed for Delhi NCR BFSI openings.
items.body: Good programme for North India BFSI careers. UPES brand is stronger in corporate finance and energy sector finance than in traditional investment banking. NIRF #36 Management rank is a strong credential.

items.name: Vikas Joshi
items.liked: Fintech subject was applicable to digital banking product work. Corporate Valuation gave practical M&A grounding.
items.disliked: Faculty depth for advanced econometrics topics could be stronger. Some assignments were too theory-focused for working professionals.
items.body: Solid finance credential at Rs 1,75,000 with zero-cost EMI. Best for North India corporate finance and energy sector roles. For deep investment banking in Mumbai, supplement with CFA or NISM certifications.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for UPES Online MBA Finance Management?
faqs.answer: The total program fee is Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years. Year 1 is Rs 95,000 and Year 2 is Rs 80,000. Zero-cost EMI is available at Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months. Reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before payment.

faqs.question: What scholarships does UPES offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES offers Academic/Work Experience scholarship (10% for 3+ years, 15% for 5+ years, 20% for 10+ years experience with 55%+ graduation), Alumni scholarship (20%), and Vijay Sports scholarship (35% to 100%). Eligibility confirmed at admission. Contact our counsellor for current cycle details.

faqs.question: Does UPES Finance MBA cover Fintech?
faqs.answer: Yes. Financial Technology (Fintech) is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering digital lending, blockchain payments, robo-advisory, and embedded finance platforms. This makes UPES Finance Management applicable to fintech product, digital banking, and BFSI technology transformation roles.

faqs.question: What makes UPES Finance Management different from other online MBAs?
faqs.answer: Financial Econometrics as a dedicated Sem 3 subject is uncommon in Indian online MBA programmes at Rs 1,75,000. Combined with Behavioural Finance, Corporate Valuation, and Fintech, UPES Finance Management offers a more quantitatively rigorous curriculum than most online finance MBAs at comparable fees. NIRF #36 Management ranking (2025) is a strong credibility anchor.

faqs.question: Is UPES Online MBA suitable for energy sector finance roles?
faqs.answer: Yes. UPES's 20+ year heritage in energy, petroleum, and infrastructure education means the university has strong industry connect with oil and gas, power, and infrastructure finance teams. Finance MBA graduates benefit from UPES alumni networks at energy sector companies that specifically recruit from UPES.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A, NIRF #36 Management finance MBA with Financial Econometrics, Corporate Valuation, and Fintech at Rs 1,75,000.
You are targeting corporate finance, investment analysis, or fintech roles in North India or energy sector companies.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month and WES-recognised degree credentials.
consider: If Mumbai investment banking or BFSI brand recognition is the primary goal, NMIMS Online MBA Financial Management carries stronger Mumbai market recognition.
If ACCA professional qualification alongside finance depth is the target, JAIN Online MBA International Finance (ACCA) delivers ACCA-aligned curriculum.
If zero-cost EMI and North India banking careers are the priority, LPU Online MBA Finance at Rs 1,61,600 with grant is a comparable alternative.
